name: Dijkstra Shortest Path
applicable_scenarios: single-source shortest path in a weighted graph with non-negative edges
routing on road, transit, or communication networks
base case for many graph-distance problems
typical_cases: maze / grid navigation with uniform-positive costs
common_pitfalls: requires non-negative edge weights; use Bellman-Ford for negatives
without a priority queue, complexity degrades to O(V^2)
for all-pairs paths, Floyd-Warshall or Johnson's is often preferable
dense graphs benefit from contraction hierarchies / A* with a heuristic
